mode_rationale: Pre-flight directive scan returned one pending directive: DIRECTIVE-20260516-002-decider-context-load-extraction (priority=medium, filed_at=2026-05-16T07:30:00Z). Routing to Mode 4 (proposal authorship). Quick Mode 1/2 checks healthy (no stalls, no new strandings beyond known carry-overs); backlog metrics show open_issues_total=55 / no thresholds firing.

mode1_pipeline_health.note: Same as 06:10Z — stranded-2026-05-14T21-28-05Z.json (~34h) and stranded-2026-05-15T01-29-11Z.json (~30h). Both carry-overs, no new strandings. Operator-pending, not a stall.

mode4_proposals_and_selffixes.scope: Author PROP-040 per DIRECTIVE-20260516-002. Apply NOT in scope this run — proposal is design-pending-operator-review.

Verbatim line ranges identified (Step 2a = lines 100-364 of decider-curmudgeon.md, 265L). Cross-references mapped (3 in decider.md, 2 in routing-matrix.md, 1 in tinker-cost-engineering.md). Counter-arguments per operator preference: 7 distinct CA-1 through CA-7. Empirical Priority-4-fires rate measured: 13% (3/23 recent decider runs). Avg savings projected: ~230L/run (above directive's 150-200L target). Filenames open question for operator (operator-spec vs accuracy-improved alternative). Awaiting operator review.

Surfaced in PROP-040 phase_2_candidates section. NOT applied in Phase 1 per operator constraint. Recommend re-measuring at next Mode 3 (target: 2026-05-19) and only filing Phase 2 PROP if any agent crosses 20%.

FIND-2026-05-16-04_stranded_patches_rout.verification: Same as 06:10Z. Ages now ~30-34h. No action; carrying forward.

backlog_trend.trend_assessment: Backlog continues healthy. Net +125/7d (slight reduction from 06:10Z's +142, expected — closure-ledger samples a sliding 7d window that's now shedding higher-throughput days from earlier in the week). Open total stable at 55. baby_drain_count_7d=5 confirms PROP-034 Phase 1 deployed and analyst-baby is consolidating BAU tracker items. verify_drain_count_7d=0 — PROP-038 Phase 1 just deployed at 06:39Z this morning; curmudgeon-verify won't produce its first review until its first scheduled fire (every 4h, next due ~08:30Z). Will re-check at next Mode 3.

findings.summary: DIRECTIVE-20260516-002 executed in this run. Authored PROP-040 (decider context-load extraction) as design-pending-operator-review. Phase 1 design: extract decider-curmudgeon.md lines 100-364 (Step 2a, 265L) to new conditional reference file decider-curmudgeon-pq-mechanics.md, loaded only when decider.md Priority 4 fires (~13% of runs). Projected avg savings: ~230L/run, above directive target of 150-200L.
evidence: monitor/prompts/reference/decider-curmudgeon.md inspected (490L, sections mapped via awk grep ^##)
23 daily-report-*.json files sampled for Priority-4-fires rate: 3/23 = 13%
Counter-arguments per operator preference 'Think about the other side of the argument too': 7 distinct (CA-1 through CA-7)
findings.recommended_action: Operator review of PROP-040. Decisions needed: (Q1) filename (operator-spec 'decider-curmudgeon-pq-mechanics.md' vs tinker's accuracy-improved suggestion 'decider-curmudgeon-integration.md'); (Q2) trigger framing (Priority-4-fires vs queue-depth — tinker recommends Priority-4-fires for 5x more savings); (Q3) Phase 2 timing on next Mode 3 (~2026-05-19). On approval: tinker self-applies in single decider-clone session (~10 min). Phase 1 exit criteria measured at 2026-05-23.
